title: Example feature
summary: One-paragraph summary of the feature, grounded in the product brief context.

target_repos._comment: Repos involved in this feature. Each alias must match a registered repo in .env (REPO_<ALIAS>_URL). For single-repo setups, this may contain one entry matching TARGET_REPO_URL.

repos.ci_commands: cargo build && cargo test && cargo clippy -- -D warnings

external_drivers.description: Competitor X launched feature Y on 2026-03-01

product_context._comment: Synopsis of the product in its entirety, drawn from the product brief. The user verifies this anchor statement before proceeding.
product_context.product_synopsis: [Product Name] helps [target users from product brief] solve [problem statement] by [strategy summarized]. Success is measured by [PG-xxx metrics referenced]. This session addresses [TV-xxx: journey name], which advances [PG-xxx] by [specific mechanism].
product_context.product_synopsis_format: [Product Name] helps [target users] solve [problem] by [strategy]. Success is measured by [PG-xxx metrics]. This session addresses [TV-xxx], which advances [PG-xxx] by [mechanism].

product_goals_referenced.goal: Reduce payment processing latency to <200ms p99

thin_verticals_addressed.why_this_helps_users: Users currently lose 15 minutes re-entering payment details after a timeout. This vertical eliminates that friction by enabling idempotent retry with preserved form state.

product_review._comment: Session-specific product decisions. Anchored to the product synopsis above.
product_review.session_problem: Specific problem this kickoff session addresses.
product_review.target_user_impact: How this feature helps the product brief's target users solve their stated problems — not just the feature's perceived problem in isolation.

session_goals.description: Users can retry a failed payment without re-entering card details

session_non_goals: NOT: Partial payment support — because TV-005 covers this separately
NOT: Admin dashboard for payment monitoring — deferred to TV-008

constraints.description: Must support offline mode for mobile clients
No new runtime dependencies without approval
All PII must be encrypted at rest
No new unwrap() in non-test code
p99 latency must stay under 50ms for affected paths

architecture_notes: PaymentGateway (PROC-002) requires idempotency key for retry safety
OrderStateMachine (COMP-002) needs a new pending_retry state

interfaces_impacted.change_detail: No changes — consumed but not modified

components_impacted.name: OrderStateMachine
components_impacted.change_detail: Add pending_retry state and transition rules

risks.description: Retry logic could charge customers twice if idempotency key is not correctly propagated
risks.mitigation: Integration test for duplicate charge prevention

success_criteria.description: PaymentRetry endpoint returns 200 with idempotency key on duplicate submission
OrderStateMachine correctly transitions to pending_retry state on payment timeout

tickets.title: Add pending_retry state to OrderStateMachine
scope: Add transition rules: payment_timeout → pending_retry → retrying
Add validation: prevent retry on already-completed orders
implementation_guidance: Reuse existing state transition pattern in COMP-002
Do not modify IF-001 in this ticket — that is ENG-102

acceptance_criteria.description: OrderStateMachine transitions to pending_retry on payment timeout event
Transition from completed → pending_retry is rejected with InvalidTransition error

test_traceability_matrix.success_criteria: State machine transitions to pending_retry when payment_timeout event is received in payment_pending state

test_traceability_matrix.extra_testing_notes: Test that completed → pending_retry is rejected
test_traceability_matrix.success_criteria: InvalidTransition error returned when attempting pending_retry from completed state

test_traceability_matrix.extra_testing_notes: Verify existing state transitions are not broken by new state addition
test_traceability_matrix.success_criteria: All pre-existing state transition tests continue to pass

deliverables.description: pending_retry state and transition rules in OrderStateMachine
Unit tests for new state transitions

notes: Existing state machine uses enum + match pattern — extend, do not replace

tickets.escalation_rule: If state transition semantics are ambiguous (e.g., what happens on retry of a refunded order), stop and return to planning.
tickets._comment: TV = ticket = atomic unit. No sub-tickets. RED/GREEN/REFACTOR is execution detail within the ticket, not separate planning artifacts. If a TV has multiple behaviors, split it into separate TVs.

business_tasks.title: Research competitor retry UX patterns
business_tasks.description: Survey top 5 competitors' payment retry UX to inform TV-002 design decisions.
acceptance_criteria: Documented comparison of retry flows across 5 competitors
